name: Datadog Example - AWS Credential Misuse Field Correlation
message: Example field-correlation version of the AWS credential misuse detection. This is not counted as an active lab monitor.
triage: Review source IP, access-key owner, user agent, IAM action, policy target, and whether the actor is approved automation.
example_boundary: Comparison artifact only. The 7 active lab monitors remain scenario-scoped so the public replay is deterministic.
